title: Diploma Jobs 2026 – Junior Clerk/Copyist
shortInfo: District Court Rayagada Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Junior Clerk/Copyist. Candidates with Diploma, Any Graduate Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 17-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through District Court Rayagada official website rayagada.dcourts.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: District Court Rayagada Junior Clerk/Copyist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Court Rayagada Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Junior Clerk/Copyist. Candidates with Diploma, Any Graduate Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 17-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through District Court Rayagada official website rayagada.dcourts.gov.in.

application_fee.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

age_limit.maximum_age: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the District Court Rayagada Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.education_qualification: +3 examination or equivalent from a recognized University, Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized Institute, Passed test in Oriya equivalent to M.E. standard
qualification.details: +3 examination or equivalent from a recognized University. Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized Institute. Passed test in Oriya equivalent to M.E. standard.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://rayagada.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Junior Clerk/Copyist posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Junior Clerk/Copyist posts is 17th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: What are the educational qualifications required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed a +3 examination or equivalent from a recognized university, possess a Diploma in Computer Application, and have passed a test in Oriya equivalent to the M.E. standard.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Junior Clerk/Copyist position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Junior Clerk/Copyist post in the District Court Rayagada recruitment.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Junior Clerk/Copyist role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 19,900 to Rs. 63,200 per month, as per Level-04 in the Pay Matrix under ORSP Rules, 2017.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the Junior Clerk/Copyist posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test (English, Arithmetic, General Knowledge), a Computer Science Test (Practical), and a Viva-Voce Test.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for the Junior Clerk/Copyist posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Court Rayagada, which is https://rayagada.dcourts.gov.in.

faq.question: What documents should I attach with the application form?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of required documents such as a photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates with the application form.

faq.question: In which state is this recruitment being conducted?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted in the state of Odisha, specifically in the city of Rayagada.
